allow: Bash("C:/MAMP/bin/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 naboting -e "SELECT item_id, owner_id, title FROM items ORDER BY item_id;")

Bash("C:/MAMP/bin/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 naboting -e "SELECT image_id, item_id FROM item_images ORDER BY image_id; SELECT accessory_id, item_id, name FROM accessories ORDER BY accessory_id;")
Bash("C:/MAMP/bin/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 naboting -e "DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS ensure_single_primary_image;")

Bash("C:/MAMP/bin/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 naboting -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as items FROM items; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as images FROM item_images; SELECT COUNT\(*\) as accessories FROM accessories; SHOW TRIGGERS;")
Bash("C:/MAMP/bin/mysql/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -proot -h 127.0.0.1 -P 3306 --default-character-set=utf8 naboting -e "SELECT item_id, title, brand, category FROM items ORDER BY item_id;")
